DatasetTitle: TYPE OF COMMUNAL ESTABLISHMENT BY COUNTRY OF BIRTH BY SEX
StatisticalPopulations: All usual residents in communal establishments
Annotations: 1. 'EU' is the European Union and is as defined on Census day (27 March 2011).; 2. Country of Birth - 'Other' consists of persons born at sea or in the air, or with country of birth not stated.; 3. 'Member countries prior to 2004 expansion' includes United Kingdom (part not specified) and Ireland (part not specified).; 4. 'Accession countries 2004 onwards' includes Republic of Cyprus; Other includes Cyprus (not otherwise specified).; 5. ‘Residents’ excludes staff or owners and family members of staff or owners.; 6. 'HSCT (Health and Social Care Trust)' was referred to as NHS/HSSB in the 2001 Census.;
